scenario.name: Basic UAS responder
scenario.send: SIP/2.0 408 Request Timeout [last_Via:] [last_From:] To: sip:81002001@rwtrunk.com;tag=11002 [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Allow: INVITE,ACK,OPTIONS,BYE,CANCEL,INFO,REFER,NOTIFY,PRACK,UPDATE Content-Length:[len]
